improvements.title: Screen shake on wrong order / expired timer
Urgent order card pulses red when timer < 3s
Plate glows green with '✓ READY TO SERVE!' when combo matches
Streak counter with bonus coins for consecutive correct orders

skipped.title: Combo multiplier overlay animation
skipped.reason: Saved for round 2 — needs score pop animation

notes: Game feel improved dramatically. Screen shake + red pulse make mistakes feel impactful. Green glow on plate removes the biggest clarity issue. Score jumped from 5.5 to 7.8. Round 2 should focus on visual polish and a score pop animation.
